hero.title: kül
hero.sub: Peppers charred over open flame, smoked low and slow, then aged until the heat turns quiet and deep. Four sauces. One obsession with smoke.

story.heading: We chase the ember, not the burn.
paras: **kül** — the Turkish word for *ash* — started on a rooftop grill, blistering peppers until their skins went black and their sugars turned to smoke.

Most hot sauces shout. Ours smoulders. We roast every pepper over live fire, fold in charred garlic and toasted spice, then let the batch rest until the heat settles into something you can actually taste. **No thickeners, no shortcuts, no gimmicks.**
Bottled by hand in runs of a few hundred at a time — because the good stuff can't be rushed.

products.heading: Four sauces, one fire
products.sub: From a gentle glow to a slow-building inferno. Each is roasted, smoked, and bottled by hand.

items.name: Ember
items.label: #f4a83f
items.notes: The gentle one. Sweet smoke, a whisper of chipotle, warmth that lingers. Goes on everything.

items.name: Cinder
items.label: #ff8a3d
items.notes: Earthy Aleppo pepper meets fire-blistered reds. Fruity up front, a proper warm hum on the finish.

items.name: Ash
items.label: #ff5a1f
items.notes: Where it gets serious. Tropical habanero, umami-deep black garlic, smoke that sticks around.

items.name: Kül Noir
items.label: #b3121a
items.notes: Jet-black and reckless. Ghost pepper heat wrapped in charcoal smoke. Respect the drop count.

heat.heading: The heat scale
heat.sub: Measured in Scoville Heat Units. Bars are drawn on a log scale so you can actually see where the gentle glow ends and the trouble begins.

pillars.title: Live-fire roasting
pillars.body: Every pepper is blistered over open flame until the skins char and the flesh sweetens. That black edge is where the flavour lives.

pillars.title: Low & slow smoke
pillars.body: We cold-smoke the mash over oak and vine cuttings, then age it 48 hours so the heat mellows into something deep and rounded.

pillars.title: Bottled by hand
pillars.body: No factory line. Small runs, filled and labelled by hand, batch-numbered so you know exactly which fire your bottle came from.

cta.heading: Get first dibs on every batch
cta.sub: New drops sell out fast. Leave your email and we'll warn you before the next fire — plus 10% off your first order.

footer.tagline: Small-batch smoked hot sauce, born from ash and bottled by hand. Made for people who taste before they sweat.
